subject: chore(pwa): eager _canInstall init + update docs
body:
Initialize _canInstall from pre-captured window.__pwaInstallPrompt at
module scope so the first render has the correct value — eliminates an
extra render cycle on cached SW repeat visits.

Update SESSION_NOTES.md and HISTORY.md for this session's work.

Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
